# rapp-static-mcp
> Make an MCP server for any use case with no server. The repo IS the MCP: tools bind to content-addressed compute cells, verified (sha8) before execution. One generic transport shim runs; everything else is static.

## Start
- Spec: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kody-w/rapp-static-mcp/main/SPEC.md
- Skill (drop-in for agents): https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kody-w/rapp-static-mcp/main/SKILL.md
- Transport: shim.mjs · Build: build.mjs · Scaffold: new-mcp.mjs · Template: template/

## Examples (each a runnable MCP)
- unit-convert — convert length/mass/temperature: https://kody-w.github.io/rapp-static-mcp/examples/unit-convert/tools.json
- text-tools — slugify / wordcount / sha256: https://kody-w.github.io/rapp-static-mcp/examples/text-tools/tools.json

## Run any example
{ "command": "node", "args": ["shim.mjs", "--catalog", "<that tools.json url>"] }
